name: Garlic Flavored Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1 tablespoon (15 ml) wine
1 tablespoon (15 ml) soy sauce
2 teaspoons (10 ml) garlic salt
1/4 teaspoon (1 ml) sugar
2 Eggs -- lightly beaten
3 tablespoons (45 ml) flour
Optional: 1 dash of five-spice powder
4 cups (1 L) oil
1. Combine chicken with garlic, wine, soy sauce, garlic salt, and sugar; marinate for 2 hours.
2. Add the beaten eggs and flour to the chicken and mix well.
3. Heat oil in a wok until it reaches near smoke point. Reduce heat to medium. Deep fry chicken for 2 to 3 minutes or until tender.
NOTE: The Garlic Chicken I had was bone-in.
